View a log of all recent changes to the HEAD, allowing you to recover lost commits or undo accidental hard resets.
Deep clean: Removes all unused containers, networks, images (including those without at least one container associated), and volumes to reclaim disk space.
Find the Process ID (PID) and resource usage of a specific running process to assist in debugging or killing hung tasks.

commands.command: EXPLAIN ANALYZE SELECT * FROM table_name WHERE id = 1;
commands.description: Executes the query and provides a detailed execution plan with actual timing, essential for identifying slow database bottlenecks.
Compress a directory into a gzipped tarball for efficient storage or transfer.
